ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "stu_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "stu_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the student's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student (e.g., student, instructor, advisor, admin) */,
  "major" TEXT /* The student's major field of study */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The current academic year of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* The cumulative GPA of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The student's date of birth */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The student's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* The student's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester when the course is offered */,
  "format" TEXT /* The format of the course (e.g., online, on-campus, hybrid) */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of prerequisite courses */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* The maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the primary instructor for the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department offering the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "stu_id" TEXT /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester when the course was taken */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade earned by the student in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* The date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped, completed) */,
  "final_score" REAL /* The final score of the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_stu_id FOREIGN KEY ("stu_id") REFERENCES students ("stu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the instructor is employed */,
  "title" TEXT /* The academic title of the instructor (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* The location of the instructor's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The instructor's phone number */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* The research interests of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-instructor pair */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester when the course is taught */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the instructor in the course (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor */,
  "advisor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the advisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the advisor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the advisor is employed */,
  "title" TEXT /* The academic title of the advisor (e.g., Professor, Advisor) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* The location of the advisor's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The advisor's phone number */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* The area of specialization of the advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_advisors" (
  "student_advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-advisor pair */,
  "stu_id" TEXT /* ID of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor assigned to the student */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date when the advisor started advising the student */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date when the advisor stopped advising the student (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advisors_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advisors_stu_id FOREIGN KEY ("stu_id") REFERENCES students ("stu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "stu_id" TEXT /* ID of the student earning the grade */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade earned by the student in the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester when the course was taken */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* The type of score (e.g., letter grade, GPA, percentage) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or remarks about the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_stu_id FOREIGN KEY ("stu_id") REFERENCES students ("stu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript entry */,
  "stu_id" TEXT /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade earned by the student in the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester when the course was taken */,
  "date_issued" TEXT /* The date when the transcript was issued */,
  "issued_by" TEXT /* The name of the person or office that issued the transcript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_stu_id FOREIGN KEY ("stu_id") REFERENCES students ("stu_id")
)
